Name: Rusty Sword
Description: An old sword covered in rust, but still sharp enough to defend yourself.

Name: Dragon Scale
Description: A shimmering red scale from an ancient dragon. It radiates warmth.

Name: Ancient Amulet
Description: A golden amulet engraved with dragon runes. It pulses with magical energy.

Name: Golden Dragon Egg
Description: A massive egg made of pure gold, pulsing with inner fire. Legend says a dragon will hatch from it.

Name: Ruby Necklace
Description: A stunning necklace of rubies that glow like dragon fire.

Name: Crown of Dragon Kings
Description: The crown worn by ancient kings who ruled alongside dragons.

Name: Dragon Fire Gem
Description: A gem containing the essence of dragon fire. It burns hot to the touch.

Name: Dragon Egg
Description: A large speckled egg, warm to the touch. You can hear something moving inside.

Name: Phoenix Feather
Description: A brilliant feather from a phoenix, glowing with eternal flame.

Name: Wind Stone
Description: A blue stone that howls with the sound of wind. Dragons use it to call the winds.

Name: Giant Eagle Feather
Description: A massive feather from an eagle that soars above the dragon peaks.

Name: Dragonslayer Blade
Description: The legendary sword forged specifically to slay dragons. Its edge never dulls.

Name: Shield of Heroes
Description: A shield carried by legendary dragon slayers. It bears the marks of countless battles.

Name: Heart of Flames
Description: The crystallized heart of an ancient fire elemental. Ultimate source of dragon power.

Name: Divine Scroll
Description: A scroll containing the secrets of dragon summoning, written by the gods themselves.
